channel.title: Blog on Aileen's Quibbles
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Aileen's Quibbles

item.title: List of resources used for this theme (Unrealised)
item.description: Here’s a list of resources used for the theme used on this site, Unrealised. It’s a custom hugo theme by me (mwahaha!). I feel like this theme still has a lot of unrealised potential, so the theme is still a work in progress. This list will be updated to reflect any new resources / sources of inspiration. Inspiration Theme name inspiration: Unrealised Reality, by Kari Sigurdsson Resources Base theme (theme that taught me to make this theme): kimcc’s Noteworthy theme Dev stack icons: Get Icon

item.title: New theme for the website
item.description: Finally got round to making a new theme for this website. I figured it was well-needed to learn the ins and outs of Hugo a bit better. Over the next few days, I plan to: Add the (planned) missing features. Refine the theme. Make the theme live. Update the projects/CV sections. Publish the new content as well. The plan is to update the theme yearly to keep up to date with latest best practices.

item.title: Thoughts on replacing my laptop
item.description: I’ve been using a Macbook Air Mid-2013 from, well, 2013. It was my first high quality laptop, and one that was the state of art at the time. From the moment I got this laptop, I thought, I’m now married to my laptop. But as I grow up, I realise that…maybe I’ve just grown out of it. Maybe it’s because 4 GB RAM doesn’t do much apart from browsing the web.

item.title: Sometimes there's just too much stuff
item.description: Too much you want to do and not enough time. Too much on your plate and not enough what you want. Such a paiiiiin….
